idea-plugin.name: Modern Icons
idea-plugin.description:
Modern Icons for JetBrains IDE

Replace file, folder, and tool window icons with modern, colorful, flat-design icons.

Features:

  • Modern file icons for common file types
  • Folder icons based on folder names (src, test, resources, etc.)
  • Colorful tool window icons (Project, Structure, Commit, etc.)
  • Configurable via Settings > Appearance & Behavior > Modern Icons
  • Light and dark theme support

Icons are designed to be easily recognizable and improve visual clarity in the IDE.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release with basic icon replacement
  • Support for 50+ file types
  • Folder icon matching for common directory names
  • Tool window icon replacement
